chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-686 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution 05-5-2025 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional Prosecutor General for the State.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- On 28-4-2025, following order was passed:- “None present for the applicant; no intimation is received; same was the position on the last date of hearing. Under the circumstances, this application is liable to be dismissed for non-prosecution; however in the interest of justice adjourned to 05-05-2025. Interim order passed earlier to continue till the next date of hearing.” Today is the same position, none present for the applicant, nor has any intimation received. Under the circumstances, the instant Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Naveed Ali
